targets.query:
from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cell_kpi" and r._field == "prb_dl_pct")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.generation == "${generation}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean)
  |> yield(name: "prb")

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cell_kpi" and r._field == "sinr_db")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.generation == "${generation}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean)
  |> yield(name: "sinr")

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cell_kpi" and r._field == "rsrp_dbm")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.generation == "${generation}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean)
  |> yield(name: "rsrp")

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cell_kpi" and r._field == "dl_throughput_mbps")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.generation == "${generation}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean)
  |> yield(name: "dl_tput")

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cell_kpi" and r._field == "power_w")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.generation == "${generation}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean)
  |> yield(name: "power")

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cell_kpi" and r._field == "cqi")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean)
  |> yield(name: "cqi")

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cell_kpi" and r._field == "bler_pct")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean)
  |> yield(name: "bler")

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cell_kpi" and r._field == "latency_ms")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean)
  |> yield(name: "latency")
